name: QA 1682
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1682

Exercise pmrepconf generating pmrep.conf(5) format,

valgrind-enabled variant.



Note: pmrepconf is a symink to pmlogconf



Copyright (c) 2020 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.
